Scenario: Verify Client Report shows only the logged-in user's migration data
Steps:
1. Log in as a regular user
2. Go to Report > Client Report
3. Open Migration Backup Report
ExpectedResult: Only current user's migrations and backups shown

Scenario: Verify Client Report shows Migration summary with status
Steps: 1. Open Client Report > Migration Backup Report
ExpectedResult: Each migration listed with status (Completed/Failed/Running)

Scenario: Verify Client Report shows Backup summary with status
Steps: 1. Open Client Report > Migration Backup Report
ExpectedResult: Each backup listed with source type target type and status

Scenario: Verify Client Report filters by date range
Steps:
1. Open Client Migration Backup Report
2. Apply date range filter
ExpectedResult: Only records within selected date range shown

Scenario: Verify Client Report filters by operation type (Migration / Backup)
Steps: 1. Apply type filter = Migration
ExpectedResult: Only migration records shown

Scenario: Verify Client Report filters by source type (BIM 360 / Egnyte)
Steps: 1. Apply source filter = BIM 360
ExpectedResult: Only BIM 360 source records shown

Scenario: Verify Client Report filters by target type (Amazon S3)
Steps: 1. Apply target filter = Amazon S3
ExpectedResult: Only Amazon S3 target records shown

Scenario: Verify Client Report filters by target type (File System)
Steps: 1. Apply target filter = File System
ExpectedResult: Only File System target records shown

Scenario: Verify Client Report filters by target type (S3 Compatible)
Steps: 1. Apply target filter = S3 Compatible
ExpectedResult: Only S3 Compatible target records shown

Scenario: Verify Client Report filters by target type (Azure Blob Storage)
Steps: 1. Apply target filter = Azure Blob Storage
ExpectedResult: Only Azure Blob Storage target records shown

Scenario: Verify Client Report shows file count and data size per run
Steps:
1. Open Client Report
2. Check a specific run row
ExpectedResult: File count and total size shown for that run

Scenario: Verify Client Report shows duration of each run
Steps:
1. Open report
2. Check duration column
ExpectedResult: Duration shown for each completed run

Scenario: Verify Client Report shows correct success and failure counts per run
Steps: 1. Open Client Report
ExpectedResult: Success and failure counts match actual run data

Scenario: Verify Client Report can be exported to Excel
Steps:
1. Open Migration Backup Report
2. Click Export > Excel
ExpectedResult: Excel file downloaded with user's full report data

Scenario: Verify Client Report can be exported to CSV
Steps:
1. Open Migration Backup Report
2. Click Export > CSV
ExpectedResult: CSV file downloaded with user's full report data

Scenario: Verify BIM 360 → Amazon S3 backup report record correct for client
Steps:
1. Complete a BIM 360 → Amazon S3 backup as client user
2. Open Client Report
ExpectedResult: Record appears with source=BIM 360 target=Amazon S3

Scenario: Verify client can view detailed downloaded report for a specific run
Steps:
1. Open Client Report > Downloaded Report Details
2. Select a completed run
ExpectedResult: Detailed report opens with file-level results for that run

Scenario: Verify downloaded report details show per-file status (success/failed)
Steps: 1. Open a detailed client report
ExpectedResult: Each file row shows transfer status

Scenario: Verify downloaded report details show error reason for failed files
Steps: 1. Open a detailed report with failures
ExpectedResult: Failed file rows include error message or reason

Scenario: Verify downloaded report details include file path and size
Steps: 1. Open detailed report
ExpectedResult: File path and size columns populated for each entry

Scenario: Verify client cannot see another user's detailed report
Steps: 1. Try to access another user's report URL directly
ExpectedResult: Access denied — only own reports accessible

Scenario: Verify downloaded report details can be filtered by status (success/failed)
Steps:
1. Open detailed report
2. Apply status filter
ExpectedResult: Only matching rows shown

Scenario: Verify detailed report can be exported to Excel
Steps:
1. Open detailed client report
2. Click Export > Excel
ExpectedResult: Excel file with file-level detail downloaded

Scenario: Verify detailed report shows total files processed and total size
Steps: 1. Check summary row at bottom
ExpectedResult: Totals row shows file count and cumulative size

Scenario: Verify detailed report shows run start time and end time
Steps: 1. Open detailed report header
ExpectedResult: Start and end timestamps shown

Scenario: Verify navigation between summary and detail views works for client
Steps:
1. Click a run row in summary
2. Click Back from detail view
ExpectedResult: Returns to client summary view cleanly
